title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Tata CLiQ - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Tata CLiQ - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata CLiQ. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Tata CLiQ:
Tata CLiQ is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
